reason: WPI/WPIC are drafted by the WA Supreme Court Committee on Jury Instructions but are copyrighted and published by Thomson Reuters/West. Free public access is by agreement (use limited to legal practice/research; commercial re-use and redistribution prohibited). Not a public-domain edict, so not snapshotted verbatim. The govt.westlaw.com host is bot-gated against bulk extraction.

sets.title: Washington Pattern Jury Instructions: Criminal
sets.free_access_url: reach from entry_point (criminal database slug is volatile)
